title: Scroll-Driven Assembly-Line Animation
topic: Build a scroll-driven assembly-line animation with reduced-motion fallback.
prompt: Build a scroll-driven browser animation that shows an assembly-line machine moving parts through stations. Scroll should drive meaningful progress through the sequence, not just reveal static sections. Include a reduced-motion fallback that presents the same information without scroll hijacking or continuous motion.
successCriteria: The page has a visible animated machine or assembly sequence.
Scroll position changes the scene state or progress.
Reduced-motion mode keeps the content usable without forced motion.
No scroll-linked React state loops or console errors.
